after.notes: Both moderates are postcss<8.5.10 (XSS via unescaped </style>) — one transitive via next, one in dev surface. Next is now ^15.5.18 (no critical CVE). Runtime impact: requires malicious CSS input being stringified by postcss + browser HTML context; not present in this app (no user-controlled CSS authoring). Acceptable for demo.

after_unfiltered.notes: All 1 High + 8 of 9 Medium originate in lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol (the canonical mulDiv assembly impl flagged by slither). These are unavoidable when using OZ Math and represent the FIX, not a bug.

after_filtered_lib.notes: Project code only (--filter-paths lib/): 0 High, 0 Medium. ReentrancyGuard + nonReentrant applied to TranslationAuction, JudgePanel, BuilderFeeRouter. The 1 remaining reentrancy-* finding in project code is correctly guarded by nonReentrant modifiers (defense-in-depth).

slither.status: PASS (project code 0 Medium / 0 High; OZ lib findings are accepted false positives)

details.leaked_value: GEMINI_API_KEY (AIzaSy...) embedded in Gemini 429 error URL captured to file
details.git_state: Files are untracked. .gitignore does NOT exclude outputs/. Any blanket `git add .` would commit them.
details.remediation: Add `outputs/perf_*.json` to .gitignore OR scrub the URLs OR delete the two files. Rotate the Gemini key if these have ever been pushed/shared.

daily_cap.status: PASS (code review; not exercised against live counter)

closed_ip_boundary.note: PROPRIETARY.md headers present in both dirs; full implementation is in the tree. README's closed-IP framing is an org/legal posture not a security gate.
closed_ip_boundary.status: INFO (not a security issue, business decision)

new_issues.title: Gemini API key embedded in outputs/perf_*.json (untracked)
new_issues.evidence: Gemini 429 response URL contains ?key=AIza... and was serialized into JSON files. outputs/ is not gitignored, so a `git add .` would commit the key.
new_issues.remediation: 1) Add output/perf_*.json (or outputs/) to .gitignore. 2) Delete or scrub these two files. 3) Rotate GEMINI_API_KEY if those files ever left this machine.
